cooperates.cooperate_desc: A hero comparable to Hilda is Chou because both are highly aggressive fighter/tank hybrids who excel at diving into enemy lines, controlling key targets with crowd control, dominating early skirmishes through strong mobility and dueling potential, and require precise timing and positioning to maximize their effectiveness in both solo confrontations and full team fights.

counters.counter_desc: A strong counter to Hilda is Aldous because Aldous can scale into a late-game powerhouse who deals massive single-target burst damage, punishes Hilda when she overextends with his stacking damage from Soul Steal, and can effectively lock her down with his ultimate, making it difficult for Hilda to survive prolonged fights despite her durability and early-game aggression.

dominants.dominant_desc: Hilda's Dominant Phase in the early to mid game, where her high mobility, strong sustain, and burst damage allow her to invade enemy jungle, pressure lanes, and continuously engage opponents before most heroes have fully scaled.

emblems.emblem_desc: This emblem can make her faster to move in the jungle making her easy to help her teammates.

equips.equip_desc: This equipment can tank a lot of hits from the enemy

hero.hero_overview: Hilda dominates the early game with her high durability, fast regeneration in bushes, and strong chasing ability, making her an aggressive roamer who can pressure enemies and secure kills with her powerful finishing damage.
hero.hero_strength: Hilda possesses exceptional durability and survivability, allowing her to absorb a lot of damage while staying in fights, and her passive grants fast HP regeneration and a protective shield when in bushes, making her extremely difficult to take down in the early game. She excels at pressuring lanes, invading the enemy jungle, and roaming to support teammates, while her skills provide consistent damage, crowd control, and mobility, and her ultimate delivers a powerful burst that can finish off low-health enemies, making her a highly aggressive hero capable of controlling the flow of the game and dominating early skirmishes.
hero.hero_weakness: Hilda becomes less effective in the late game because her damage output and overall impact cannot match that of scaling marksmen or mages. She relies heavily on bushes to trigger her HP regeneration and shield, so being forced into open areas reduces her survivability. Hilda can be kited or harassed by ranged heroes, making it difficult for her to engage or chase down enemies. Additionally, she struggles in team fights when facing multiple opponents at once without proper support from allies, and her effectiveness drops if she falls behind in gold or experience, limiting her ability to dominate skirmishes as she does in the early game.

spell.spell_desc: Use Revitalize on Hilda to quickly restore her health, significantly increase her survivability in both laning and team fights, and can use Revitalize if your invading the enemy jungle and need more survivability.

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Xavier aoe can help clear enemies minions for faster clear, so Hilda can get exp and zone faster. Also the skill of xavier can increase speed for faster zoning and slowing and cc enemies from afar. When Hilda almost kill the enemies after using ult, Xavier can snipe the enemies kill from other side of map
Zetian Ulti opens map, can help finding enemies and hilda for zone. Also Zetian ulti temporarily give speed to Hilda. Can help cover Hilda
The AOE helps clear minion faster, and the cc can help to stun enemies if by any chance Hilda zoning is interupted.

counters.counter_desc: Angela skill can slow and cc Hilfs, a nightmare.
Kimmy slows hilda and makes unable to chase or run
cc can be troublesome
Slows and burn cancel heal

dominants.dominant_desc:
First Wave

Check and guess if enemies will go to red or blue buff. Get that as your first destination
Use skill 1 to run directly to your jungle for extra movement speed. Run toward enemies river, when skill 1 CD is finished, used it directly to reach enemies jungle. When you reach river of enemies jungle side, make sure to show yourself to map by coming near to Tower(this is important. So enemies roam will not get EXP by showing you on their map)
Quickly check if Core/Jungler, Roam, and Mid is there. If you find them, you get EXP. If not you dont get EXP.
Just check briefly and use skill 1 to go directly into Mid Lane to help clear mid lane.
If during this stage you found Jungler, Roam, and Mid, you will be at level 2 after clearing first wave with your Mid.

First Water Minion

Now you go into the Water Minion and help contest that. When contesting, there is a possibility for you to knock enemies Jungle or Mid (do it when your Mid and Jungle is here as well)
Once the enemies Jungle gone, help clear Mid again. By doing this, you should be at Level 3 or near level 3.

Once you clear 2nd wave of Mid,  go to Gold (by this time, mostly all enemies will be about go to EXP to prepare for first Turtle (no stream yet).
Help clear the Gold lane wave, push enemies back, and get the gold creep with your gold laner.

First Turtle Spawn
By now the stream for turtle will likely start flowing to turtle and exp lane. Ride it, use skill 1 to run fast into Mid Lane, help clear minion, you should be about to reach level 4, or level 4 already. then use skill 1 again to run into EXP lane and zone enemies bush. If you have not reach level 4 can help clear exp lane for level 4 then help zoning area and hold enemies jungle to secure first turtle
dominants.dominant_title: Early Game Rotation, Lv 4 on first turtle

dominants.dominant_desc:
Mid game is about zoning around the map. Dont play reactive.
E.g if you are in EXP and you see GOLD is ganked, dont run to Gold, help secure EXP

Focus on Hit and Run.
Zone fast using skill 1 and river to run to either side of map, help open vision and bush while running around the map
Poke enemies heroes using skill 2 and basic atk, then use skill 1 to run from enemies. This is to force enemies to run back and stack up your thunderbelt

Watch the map and see if your mates need help. Hilda Ulti can help securing a kill when stack is up, or cc the enemies and get your mates a kill and yourself an assist.

If you are ahead in Gold, get Queens Wing for helping you securing kill. As it has damage reduction on low hp. And extra damage on low hp, while giving damage penetration.
Queens wing also helpful to help picking enemies with thick defense. Paired with domi ice, tank heals are reduced for easier kill.

Keep doing this and you will be likely stacking up on thunderbelts

During Lord, do not hit the Lord, instead run around checking bushes to find where the enemies Jungler at. Once you find them, you can hit them using skill 2 for damage and basic attack.
By attacking enemies Jungle, you either force enemies jungler to defend and attack you instead, or have enemies flank to help their jungler. Thus giving safe space for your jungler to secure lord.

Save skill 1 for emergency run / save.
Save ULTI for CC enemies jungler.

If by any chance the enemies jungle try to contest retribution, watch the lord HP, then use ulti near the moment where enemies jungler might use retri. This will cc then and make em unable to retri.
If by any chance you lost contest, use skill 1 either to run with mate, or help moving fast to mate to secure hero kill.

Once you reach late game. Your thunderbelt stack should be at 30+.
Sell Queens Wing and change to oracle. This helps you to become more tanky and heal faster inside bush. Shield 1 now will grant you tons of armor.
Or depends on situation change to either Pauldron or Blade Armor.
Your role is not hit and run now, by this time most enemies hero might already have damage penetration. So your role is to zone, and help teammates by soaking their damage to you.

Keep Healing Spring for war or lord. During contest with enemies, when you have a teammate, just use skill 2 combo then skill 3 for securing big damage and armor loss to enemies so your mate can secure the kill.

If possible run around map to clear 1 of the 3 minion spawn in order to slowly push enemies lane behind for easier lord space

emblems.emblem_desc:
Tank for extra Def and HP. 
Thrill for damaging enemies (Hilda specialists). Good for chipping damage on end game or poking around.
Wilderness blessing to allow you invade enemies jungle and zone fast from top to bottom using the river, combined wirh skill 1
Concussive blast for extra damage AOE. Good for clearing minions and damaging enemies

equips.equip_desc:
1. Rapid boots for faster zoning, combined with wilderness blessing and skill 1
2. Thunder Belt for damage and Def scaling
3. Dominance Ice for anti heal and hybrid def
4. Queens Wing, for Barbarian style, if you can knock some kills and enemies heroes are thin and easy to kill, get it.
If you are behind enemies gold, get Oracle instead for stacking with skill 1 shield.
Queens Wing is interchangeable to Oracle, Chapice Pauldron, or Blade Armor. This is situational and depends on enemies and timing.
5 and 6 is depends on which damage hits harder, but usually stayd around Anti Cuiras, Athena Shield, or Radiant

hero.hero_overview: Roaming Hilda is about putting pressure to the enemies. To do this you need to zone to different side of the maps fast, while being a semi-tanking that keeps poking to enemies hero.
hero.hero_strength:
Fast movement with extra shield, good for hit and run. Bushes will give extra advantage due to passive.
Late game Hilda can help chip tons of enemies damage due to passive + ulti, or securing damage on last hit, while being in front line.
hero.hero_weakness:
CC heroes are Hilda's biggest nightmare. 
Kimmy, Ixia, Zhask, Yi Shun Shin, any heroes that makes you unable to run! 
Despite being a tank, Hilda cannot soak damage fully unless backed up by team mates.

spell.spell_desc:
Revitalize can be used as extra HP. You only think of HP and cooldown as Hilda user. This adds extra layer of HP. When you are flanked, team mates might back you up, use this to soak more damage, and heal nearby mates sharing damage.
When you trying to run away from enemies but no bush, can use this as well for extra HP while running from enemies.
The most practical way is to use it when you help a flanked teammate. Jump into the enemies, hit Ulti for CC, turn it up to heal mate, then push enemies back while healing your mates.

cooperates.cooperate_desc: With hilda as a roamer and alucard as the jungler, they can invade early and start stacking kills from there.

counters.counter_desc: Hilda faces a lot of issues when dealing with spell vamp heroes such as dyrroth, alpha, Yu Zhong and others

dominants.dominant_desc:
This is when hilda shines, she can dish out a lot of damage while sustaining HP frkm her passive.

You should spend most of you time on the enemy jungle and keep harassing the enemy jungler so by 1st turtle, the enemy jungler cannot contest.

emblems.emblem_desc:
Thrill gives hilda the early attack boost for her to be lethal against assassins.
Tenacity gives a survival chance until skill one is off cooldown.
Concussive blast is very good on high HP heroes in general, and since hilda will be in the middle of the Fight, a single prock of this can make or break

equips.equip_desc: Focus on quick building Thunder Belt, rest adjust depending on the most annoying damage type against you.

hero.hero_overview: Hilda is a great overall Roamer right now
hero.hero_strength: Hilda excels early to mid game, where she can poke and harrass enemies in their own jungle, if hilda is played right, she can snowball out of control.
hero.hero_weakness: Usually hilda starts to drop off in damage when enemies start reaching level 15, and clump up together, at this point she can pnly soak up damage and bait out spells and skill for her allies to finish the fight.

spell.spell_desc:
Revitalize is very important, you can use in either when your hp is low or when one of your spell vampallies needs that extra umph to survive.

Heroes like alpha, thamuz or even fredrinn can benefit a lot with you just hovering around them, healing them as they dish out damage.

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Xavier can pin down enemies and give Hilda a reliant movement speed bonus. If their combos are executed properly, the enemy marksman would have trouble escaping.

Hilda wouldn't need to manually chase down Marksmans with her decaying speed bost from her first skill. Chips can provide a valuable instant transporation above immobilizing opponents. Hilda still have her first skill to spare incase the enemy Marksman opens the gap.

counters.counter_desc:
Silvanna can melt down semi-tanky characters, where Hilda fits the category. Take note that this counter is exclusive to a 1v1 scenario and not teamfight. Thamuz, Freya, Yu Zhong, and Dyrroth can do the same job. But, Silvanna is proven to be the most efficient.

Tip: If at disadvantage, especially if you are aware, escape by using first skill promptly.

Valir denies and charge attempts. Hilda would have trouble finding a pin hole to hunt opposing Marksmans. Though reliable, Hilda can just anticipate Valir by flanking the siege from their planks. If Valir constantly focuses on Hilda, his entire skills are wasted instead.

Tip against Valir: Never clump youself with your teammate.

dominants.dominant_desc:
Play aggressively in this phase. Hilda is one of the strongest character when it comes to early game.
Tip:
-Invade immediately after clearing minion wave.
-Pressure your opposing junglers and discourage their attempts in jungles.

After building Hunter Strike, brute force your way to their back ranks. Target vulnerable squishy heroes and reduce their overall damage dealers.
Tip:
-Even with just Hunter Strike, Hilda's complete combo would easily decimate squishy heroes. So take advantage of this.
-Zone enemy's jungler and provide vision by roaming around the enemy's jungle side.

Hilda would have trouble soaking up damage in this phase, so charge precaution.
Tip:
-Roam and Zone. Don't try to engange unecessary skirmmish without your teammates. Just run around with your first skill to provide reliable vision.
-Trade Hilda for their Marksman. Now, this sounds contradictory but once Hilda unleashes her full combo, it would take time to recovery her cooldown completely. Pragmatically gesturing, she is useless for a while during a teamfight. Better remove one of their proactive piece before leaving.

Gameplay:
-Aggressive (Early Game)
-Passive Aggressive (Mid to Late Game)
Combo:
-First. Charge until you close the gap between you and the enemy.
-Second>Second>Second. Complete this series to implant stack to the opponent.
-Basic Attack. Her basic attack now conjures her old first skill basic attack which slows down the enemy.
-Basic Attack until full stack or Ultimate immediately. Either way, this is a devastating combo that leaves a huge hole to your enemies' HP.

emblems.emblem_desc:
-Fighter Emblem provides the highest adaptive attack (on par with common emblem) which her ultimate would gladly indulge. Moreover, the sustain it gives makes her a threat in the earlier phases of the game.
-Thrill to further solidify the attack gained from emblem
-Wilderness Blessing to increase her mobility outside combat, letting her brute force strategy work flawlessly.
-Lethal Ignition, used to ignite enemies that are lucky enough to survive her complete combo. This discourages Hilda to chase enemies deep into their territory.

equips.equip_desc:
-Rapid Boots is a compelling item that backs up her early regen, reducing the amount of recalls done. As for the main purpose, the mobility it gives, outside combate, is paired well with Wilderness Blessing which allows her to hunt down squishy heroes.
-Hunter Strike provides CD reduction and damage. This is the safest damage item to build when leaning over to CD reduction.
-Oracle is a blessing of an item that grants a regen boost to her passive and first skill's shield. Also, CD reduction is inclusive here.
-Brute Force Breastplate maily focuses about the CD reduction. Aside from it, it also gives Hilda a scrap of physical attack to further boost her damage while not giving up sustain.
-Blade of Despair and Malefic are the highest caliber of Physical + Penetration combo that completes her damage and bypassing subtle physical defenses boost from Rose Gold Meteor.

hero.hero_overview: Hilda was seen usage from the recent patch in higher rank games. Her mobility, damage, and sustain makes her entries brute force the ranks during siege.
hero.hero_strength: Simple combo that ultimately leads to a devastating damage is one of the reason her usage rose. High mobility that lets her chase vulnerable damage dealers that carelessly detach themselves from their roamers. And enough sustain to soak up damage whilst chasing them.
hero.hero_weakness: After match sourcing, completing matches in high ranked classic games (she is always banned in ranked games, so I can't find reason to invest my time), as of now, there is no evidence of her weakness aside from a 1v1 scenario against: Thamuz, Silvanna, Freya, Yu Zhong, Dyrroth, and Badang. Though her weakness exist, it is simply compromised by just running away.

data.recommend: This is Hilda's Guild published under the version, 2.1.18. Nerfs are expected to deal with this character. This guide is only effective in this patch.

spell.spell_desc:
Revitalize is maily used because of the passive. The ability to increase shield and HP regen is a close acquaitance of Hilda's passive and first skill, which are both inclusive to healing and shield.
Tip(When to use): Only use this spell upon charging, not when low on HP. Remember, this is not Vengeance so it is better to use this spell earlier than later.

hero.hero_overview: Hilda is a fighter/tank hero in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang known for her high mobility, strong sustainability, and powerful burst damage. She excels at ambushing enemies, absorbing damage, and regenerating HP when in the bush.
hero.hero_strength: Hilda is a high-pressure fighter/tank who shines in aggressive plays and early-game dominance.
hero.hero_weakness:
Vulnerable to crowd control (CC) since she relies on mobility.
Falls off in the late game if enemies build defense.
Struggles against ranged heroes who can poke her from a distance.

spell.spell_desc: Applicable buff for Her Passive Shield and Regen.

cooperates.cooperate_desc: The two heroes can create a good combo pressuring the enemy's jungler continuesly making it difficult for them to farm in ease. By Hilda's harassing combo and Zhuxin's skillset the enemy's jungler will be disabled.

counters.counter_desc: Karrie can effectively counter Hilda by bursting through her tankiness with her true damage. In team fights Karrie's true damage ignores Hilda's defense, quickly reducing health.

dominants.dominant_desc:
During Team Fights: Position yourself to absorb damage for your team while targeting squishy backline heroes.

Laning and Dominant Phase: Hilda's durability snd mobility can dominate exp lane. Continuesly rotate between lanes and jungle area to apply pressure and make it difficult for the enemy jungler to farm effectively.
dominants.dominant_title: (Before Level 4): Focus on utilizing Hilda's bush health regeneration to sustain in the lane and harass enemies. Use her mobility to secure enemies positioning.

emblems.emblem_desc: With Concussive Blast, Hilda can clear minion waves more efficiently, enabling her to assist teammates in invading and team fights quicker than most exp lane heroes. Her Wilderness Blessing provides enhanced mobility, allowing her to rotatte between lanes effectively and disrupt the enemy jungler's movements, making it  difficult for them to keep up with her.

equips.equip_desc: This build enhance Hilda's durability, sustainability, and utilities on battle. Tough Boots - Dire Hit increases her magic resistance and boosts her damage potential. Thunder Belt provides cooldown reduction, bonus true damage, and utility for wave clearing and chasing enemies. Oracle amplifies her healing and shields, synergizing with her passive regeneration. Dominance Ice reduces enemy attack speed and shields, countering core heroes effectively. Together, with Radiant Armor and Blade Armor.

hero.hero_overview: Hilda is a strong pick this season, thanks to her ability to regenerate health in bushes and effectively chase down squishy heroes. She excels in the laning phase, even without teammates, and can contribute to both macro and micro plays in challenging situations. With her combination of tankiness and damage potential, Hilda can adapt to various roles on the battlefield. Consider mastering Hilda to take full advantage of her strengths this season.
hero.hero_strength: Hildas strength lies in her exceptional sustainability and adaptability on the battlefield. Her passive ability to regenerate health in bushes provides her with consistent durability during skirmishes and extended fights. In the laning phase, she can hold her ground effectively even without teammates, showcasing her independence and resilience. Her burst damage allows her to quickly eliminate squishy opponents, while her innate tankiness enables her to absorb substantial damage.
hero.hero_weakness: Hilda's weaknesses comes from facing sustained damage or crowd control. Despite her tankiness, she can struggle against heroes with consistent poke or burst damage that prevents her from fully utilizing her health regeneration in bushes. Her reliance on bushes for sustain makes her predictable in positioning, which skilled opponents can exploit.

spell.spell_desc: Hilda's sustainability improves significantly with the use of Revitalize, which not only enhances her regeneration but also heals nearby teammates. This additional sustain boosts her tankiness, allowing her to invade enemy territory confidently and endure prolonged battles with greater efficiency.

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Hilda is compatible with tank/fighter allies like Tigreal or Leomord, who can help initiate teamfights and provide crowd control, allowing her to dive in and deal damage. She also works well with ranged damage dealers like Granger or Claude, as her ability to absorb damage and initiate fights lets them deal damage safely from the backline. Additionally, healers like Rafaela or Carmilla can support Hilda's sustain, while crowd control specialists like Chou or Kaja help lock down enemies.

counters.counter_desc: Hilda can bully Granger in the early game.

dominants.dominant_desc: In the EXP lane, use Hilda's Combat Ritual to quickly clear minion waves and gain a speed boost for better positioning. Stay near bushes to take advantage of her passive, Blessing of Wilderness, which provides health regeneration and a shield when leaving them. Focus on engaging with your opponent when your skills are off cooldown, using Art of Hunting for burst damage and Power of Wildness to disrupt fights and deal AoE damage.

emblems.emblem_desc: Tank emblem to make her durable, agilty for more movement speed, tenacity to make her more durable and concussive blast for additional damage

equips.equip_desc: Tough boots to reduce the crowd control duration of the enemy hero thunder belt for damage dominance ice for anti heal queens wings for survibilty oracle to make her healing higher and immortality for additional survibilty.

hero.hero_overview:
Hilda is a tank/fighter hero in Mobile Legends, known for her durability and burst damage. Her passive allows her to regenerate health and gain a shield when leaving bushes, making her tough in fights. With Combat Ritual, she can quickly chase or escape, while Art of Hunting deals significant burst damage to enemies.

Her ultimate, Power of Wildness, provides AoE damage, making her strong in teamfights. Hilda excels early on but relies on bushes for maximum effectiveness and can struggle against
hero.hero_strength:
1. Sustained Durability
Passive Ability (Blessing of Wilderness): Regenerates HP when inside bushes, making her hard to kill and effective at sustaining herself in fights. 
2. Strong Early Game Pressure
Hilda has high early-game damage and mobility, allowing her to dominate the laning phase and secure kills or assists.
3. Teamfight Utility
She can engage and soak up damage for her team while dealing consistent damage herself.
hero.hero_weakness: Hilda's weaknesses lie in her reliance on bushes for regeneration and shielding, which makes her less effective in open areas. She is vulnerable to being kited by ranged heroes, especially when her mobility skills are on cooldown. While strong early on, her damage output tends to fall off in the late game, making her less impactful compared to pure damage dealers.

spell.spell_desc: Hilda benefits from the Revitalize spell because it provides continuous healing over a short duration, which enhances her already strong sustain.

cooperates.cooperate_desc: You can help Hanzo in shadow form, easily take off enemy by bursting with the combination of you both

counters.counter_desc: Granger is not an easy target for Hilda, especially due to his mobility to flee from you, his skill 1 can target you while you busy on chasing him

dominants.dominant_desc: It's your choice whether to gank on enemy jungler's buff, or help your jungler, or help your marksman on gold lane. Beware on early game heroes, don't get too reckless or you'll eat your own medicine

emblems.emblem_desc: Defensive gameplay styles for Hilda and boost your agility for chasing and finishing enemy

equips.equip_desc: Great tanky build for endurance, has blade of heptaseas to target single enemy with bursts
